auth.description: Access delivery playbooks, runs, and evidence.
auth.demoHint: Demo backend accepts any password. Use admin for admin role.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Runtime values used by the console client.

contract.compiler: DSL Editor sends YAML text through the compiler request body.
contract.orchestrator: Run sends the same DSL text to the orchestrator as the requirement field.
contract.timeline: Timeline status is derived from actual orchestrator lifecycle and response fields.

builder.title: Delivery Playbook Builder
builder.description: Build reusable delivery playbooks; execution stays in the backend runtime.

prompt.title: Generated Prompt
prompt.placeholder: Click Generate Prompt to compile the current graph.

runtime.title: Execution Runtime
runtime.description: DAG, conditional edge, and repair loop runtime.

project.title: Project Intelligence
project.description: Deterministic scan of the existing codebase so FDE work can target the most urgent business capabilities.

opportunities.title: Delivery Opportunities
opportunities.description: Priority candidates derived from code evidence, routes, APIs, and verification signals.

brief.title: Run-ready Delivery Brief
brief.description: Evidence-backed requirement assembled from the current project scan.
brief.empty: No delivery brief is available yet.
brief.loadedIntoRun: Delivery brief loaded into the run workspace.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Detected project areas and their build/runtime markers.

capabilities.title: Business Capabilities
capabilities.description: Capability candidates grouped from API paths, frontend routes, and documents.

api.title: API Evidence
api.description: Controller mappings that anchor backend business behavior.

routes.title: Frontend Routes
routes.description: Client routes that reveal user-facing workflows.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Markdown sources that can ground discovery assumptions.

tests.title: Verification Signals
tests.description: Tests found in the current repository scan.

clipboard.copyFailed: Copy failed. Check browser clipboard permission.
